title: RSW 50 Silver snowflake 10" Christmas Crackers Catering New Year Party Bulk Xmas
features: Perfect for looking seasonal on any Christmas party table
Gift, Joke and hat Included in each individual cracker
description: Product Description Elegant Christmas Crackers for Events — Add Festive Style to Your Table Setting Add a touch of festive elegance to your tables with our Catering Christmas Crackers. Perfect for hotels, restaurants, and events, these 10-inch crackers bring style, fun, and seasonal cheer to every celebration, making large gatherings effortless and memorable. Festive Convenience for Large-Scale Celebrations Ideal for hotels, restaurants, and catering venues, each box includes 50 premium crackers designed to impress every guest. A simple, stylish solution for adding festive cheer to large gatherings, corporate dinners, and seasonal celebrations. Silver & White Crackers for Stylish Celebrations Each 10-inch cracker features a refined silver and white design with a festive mix inside — paper crown, joke, and small gift. Ideal for hotels, restaurants, and events, this 50-pack adds timeless style, fun, and festive spirit to every Christmas table. Holly Print Crackers for Festive Dining Featuring a white base with holly and berry design, these 12-inch crackers add colour and charm to any Christmas table. Each includes a paper crown, joke, and small gift—ideal for hotels, restaurants, and events looking to impress every guest. Classic Red & Green Crackers for Every Occasion These 12-inch crackers feature a traditional red and green design, perfect for festive tables. Each includes a paper crown, joke, and small gift—ideal for hotels, restaurants, and events seeking a timeless, joyful finishing touch this Christmas. White Christmas Crackers with Classic Elegance Add timeless charm to your festive tables with these 11-inch white crackers. Each includes a paper crown, joke, and small gift—perfect for hotels, restaurants, and events wanting a refined, versatile, and festive finishing touch. Cream & Red Crackers for Festive Dining Featuring a classic cream and red design, these 12-inch crackers bring warmth and style to any Christmas table. Each includes a paper crown, joke, and small gift—ideal for hotels, restaurants, and events seeking a refined festive touch. Which Festive Style Will You Choose? From classic silver and white to bold red and green, each 10–12 inch cracker brings its own festive charm. Perfect for hotels, restaurants, and events—choose your style and make every table setting shine this Christmas. Fun Surprises Inside Every Cracker Classic Gifts, Jokes & Games for All Ages Each cracker includes a mix of timeless festive treats—paper crown, joke, and small gift—ensuring every guest enjoys a moment of laughter and delight. Perfect for hotels, restaurants, and events wanting to add extra cheer to the Christmas table.
